tasks.subject: Add ArtifactStore.uri_for ABC method + LocalArtifactStore impl + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New abstract method on `ArtifactStore`, working impl on `LocalArtifactStore`, six tests covering the contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/stores/base.py (add abstract method)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/stores/local.py (add public uri_for delegating to _path)
- Modify: tests/stores/test_local.py (add 6 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ABC has new uri_for abstract method with no-I/O contract documented
- LocalArtifactStore.uri_for(run_id, name) returns str(self._path(run_id, name))
- 6 new tests pass (put_bytes round-trip, put_json round-trip, no-I/O on miss, stable across instances, nested name preserved, cross-instance get_bytes round-trip)
- pre-commit clean
- full test suite green; coverage >= 90%

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/stores/test_local.py -v`

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md §1, §4.1, §5.1, §5.2, §6.1
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md Task 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/stores/base.py", "src/kinoforge/stores/local.py", "tests/stores/test_local.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/stores/test_local.py -v && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/stores/base.py src/kinoforge/stores/local.py tests/stores/test_local.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ABC uri_for abstract method present with no-I/O contract", "LocalArtifactStore.uri_for returns str(self._path(run_id, name))", "6 new tests pass", "pre-commit clean", "coverage >= 90%"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Refactor JsonProfileCache to use store.uri_for; delete _uri_index/_reconstruct_uri/_uri_for
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove every workaround in `JsonProfileCache` that existed because `uri_for` was missing. Add the missing cross-instance regression test.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py (delete _uri_index, _uri_for, _reconstruct_uri; update resolve())
- Modify: tests/core/test_profiles.py (add cross-instance regression test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- grep -n "_path\b" src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py → 0 matches
- grep -n "_uri_index|_reconstruct_uri|_uri_for" src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py → 0 matches
- resolve() reads URI via self._store.uri_for(self._run_id, name)
- New cross-instance regression test passes
- All existing test_profiles.py tests still pass
- pre-commit clean
- coverage ≥ 90%

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_profiles.py -v && grep -nE '_path|_uri_index|_reconstruct_uri|_uri_for' src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py`

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md §4.2, §5.3, §6.2
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md Task 2

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py", "tests/core/test_profiles.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_profiles.py -v && grep -nE '_path|_uri_index|_reconstruct_uri|_uri_for' src/kinoforge/core/profiles.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grep _path returns 0 matches", "grep _uri_index|_reconstruct_uri|_uri_for returns 0 matches", "resolve() calls store.uri_for", "cross-instance regression test passes", "all existing tests pass", "coverage >= 90%"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-uri-for-abc.md"}
```
